_comment: Concentration Fragility Monitor config. Source: AGENT2_SPEC_ADDENDUM_FRAGILITY Sections 4-5
_status: SHADOW_MODE — informational only, no automatic weight changes

breadth_pct._note: <35 is deep EXTREME but same state — captured in trigger detail

_state_determination_note: The highest (worst) state triggered by ANY indicator determines overall state.

HEALTHY.summary: No fragility concerns. V16 operates normally.

ELEVATED.router: Recommendation: Lower router thresholds (DXY 6M < -3% instead of -5%, VWO/SPY 6M > +5% instead of +10%).
ELEVATED.spy_rsp: Recommendation: Split SPY allocation to 70% SPY + 30% RSP.
ELEVATED.xlk: Recommendation: Monitor XLK weight, no hard cap.
ELEVATED.action_description: CIO Briefing should mention ELEVATED Fragility. Agent R discusses implementation with Operator.

EXTREME.router: Recommendation: Router thresholds as ELEVATED. Additionally: minimum 5% international exposure recommended.
EXTREME.spy_rsp: Recommendation: Split SPY allocation to 30% SPY + 70% RSP.
EXTREME.xlk: Recommendation: XLK hard cap at 20% (even if V16 wants more).
EXTREME.action_description: CIO Briefing must treat EXTREME Fragility prominently. Agent R discusses concrete implementation options with Operator.

CRISIS.summary: Mag7 concentration breaking down. Immediate attention required.
CRISIS.router: Recommendation: Consider full international allocation (up to 25%). Router activation independent of standard triggers.
CRISIS.g7: Emergency review recommended: Is this cyclical (temporary) or structural (Nokia moment)?
CRISIS.action_description: Immediate CIO attention. G7 Emergency Review within 48h recommended. Agent R coordinates implementation.
